final_prompt.prompt:
Design a square logo.

Style/medium: flat vector logo, geometric
Composition:
  square format
  Flower of Life geometry in the background
  letters "C.U" in the foreground, overlapping the geometry
Subject: square logo with Flower of Life pattern behind and letters "C.U" in front
Scene/backdrop:
Lighting/mood:
Color palette:
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim): C.U
Constraints: square composition; Flower of Life must be clearly inscribed within the square
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, decorative non-geometric elements
